name: Entities
short_description: We combined fast-paced roguelike combat with a randomized procedural format to make the best third-person single player we could. Entidades is a survival game, which tells the story of a very mischievous boy, who lived in colonial Brazil, suffered from religious abuse and slavery at the time.
detailed_description:
We combined fast-paced roguelike combat with a randomized procedural format to make the best third-person single player we could.
Entidades is a survival game, which tells the story of a very mischievous boy, who lived in colonial Brazil, suffered from religious abuse and slavery at the time. A practice considered natural for the time and arriving in the spiritual world, the boy sees that his battle has just begun.

Game Features

*Start upgrade

* Combat system

*Dash

* Shooting

* Dodge

* Meteor rain

* Random phases

* Achievements system

* Random collection system
